entry.name: cliPath
entry.label: Path to the codexbar CLI binary

entry.name: trayIndicators
entry.label: Which (provider, window) indicators to render in the tray

entry.name: trayIconSize
entry.label: Tray icon + ring size in pixels (capped by panel thickness)

entry.name: showAgents
entry.label: Show running/blocked Claude + Codex agents in the popup

entry.name: agentBlockedBadge
entry.label: Show a red dot on the tray icon while any agent is blocked (legacy corner badge)

entry.name: showAgentStateDots
entry.label: Show colored count dots (working/blocked/idle) next to the tray indicators

entry.name: agentStateDotsScale
entry.label: Size scale for the stacked agent state dots, percent of the default size

entry.name: showAgentPrompts
entry.label: Show the last user prompt for each session in the popup

entry.name: includeUntrackedAgents
entry.label: Also count claude/codex processes without an active hook sentinel

entry.name: agentsRefreshSeconds
entry.label: Polling interval for agent state in seconds

entry.name: showAgentTopicInPanel
entry.label: Show the most interesting agent's task next to the tray indicators

entry.name: agentTopicMaxWidth
entry.label: Maximum width (in pixels) for the panel topic label before it elides

entry.name: closePopupOnFocusLoss
entry.label: Close the popup when focus moves away (click-to-focus briefly suppresses this so terminal jumps don't close it)
